name: Intensity band
description: Hazard-family-prefixed intensity band (from the IntensityBand collection).

name: Geometry
description: GeoSPARQL geometry for the footprint polygon (or polygon set).

name: Phenomenon time-span
description: Time-span during which the modelled phenomenon occurs.

name: Phenomenon start
description: Earliest time the modelled phenomenon begins.

name: Phenomenon end
description: Latest time the modelled phenomenon ends.
